grading_result.justification: The student correctly named all 7 layers of the OSI model and provided a brief explanation of the transport layer and an example of the application layer. However, the explanation of the layers' functions was limited. The student also provided a real-world example, but it was not fully developed.

criteria_breakdown.reason: The student correctly listed all 7 layers of the OSI model: Physical, Data Link, Network, Transport, Session, Presentation, Application.

criteria_breakdown.criterion: Explained function of at least 4 layers
criteria_breakdown.reason: The student only explained the function of the transport layer, which is not enough to meet the criterion of explaining at least 4 layers.
The student provided a real-world example of HTTP being used in the application layer for web browsing, but it was brief and lacked detail.
